meta_title: For Founders: Antigravity project template to Solve no portfolio (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no portfolio. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Antigravity Project Template to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with no portfolio. Learn how to use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to build high-value SaaS assets in record time.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap ends by deploying a high-velocity, production-ready stack. By leveraging the Antigravity project template combined with Claude Code, you can architect, scaffold, and ship a professional SaaS MVP in hours, effectively demonstrating your engineering and product-market fit capabilities to potential clients immediately.
content.intro:
The silence of an empty portfolio is deafening when you are hunting for high-ticket contracts or investors. You have the vision, but the market only rewards what it can touch, test, and verify. It is not about building more; it is about building smarter, faster, and with higher fidelity.

Today, we bridge the gap between 'idea' and 'asset'. By utilizing the Antigravity template, we bypass the boilerplate exhaustion that traps most founders. We are not just writing code; we are engineering a reputation that speaks for itself.

steps.title: Bootstrap the Architecture
steps.description: Initialize your environment using the Antigravity base to ensure industry-standard security and scalability from commit one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new SaaS project using the Antigravity template with authentication, Stripe billing, and PostgreSQL integration.

steps.title: Automate Core Business Logic
steps.description: Use Claude Code to generate the high-value business logic layer, focusing on the core problem your SaaS solves.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a service layer that handles user-specific data processing and edge-case validation for the primary SaaS feature.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate service layer for [Core Feature] with robust error handling'

steps.title: Refine the UI/UX Layer
steps.description: Transform the raw template into a polished, high-conversion interface that looks like a million-dollar product.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Apply a modern, minimalist Tailwind UI design system to the dashboard and landing page components.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'refactor dashboard components to match high-conversion SaaS design patterns'

steps.title: Implement Revenue Infrastructure
steps.description: Integrate billing flows that allow you to capture value immediately, proving your product's monetization potential.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Add a tiered subscription model using Stripe Webhooks to manage user access levels.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'integrate stripe subscription flow with existing auth schema'

steps.title: Deploy to Production
steps.description: Ship your project to a live environment to solidify your portfolio and start collecting real-world feedback.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate deployment configuration for Vercel and set up environment variable synchronization.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'configure deployment pipeline for Vercel with automated build checks'

pro_tips: Always prioritize 'ship-first' metrics; focus on the core value loop rather than perfecting low-impact design elements.
Use Claude Code to document your API endpoints as you build; documentation is a key trust signal for potential clients.
Inject your 'Why' into the README.md; founders hire other founders who can articulate the business problem clearly.
Leverage Antigravity's built-in testing suite to demonstrate code quality—it's the silent proof of a professional engineer.
Keep your MVP under 500 lines of core logic; complexity kills velocity and confuses your target audience.
content.next_steps: Deploy your project to a custom domain, add a 'Case Study' README section that explains the problem you solved, and share your live link on LinkedIn to start building your professional reputation.
content.conversion_block: You are now equipped with the tools to silence the 'no portfolio' critics and start shipping revenue-generating assets. Stop waiting for permission to be a founder. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
